'''Nova Force''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] unit led by [[Willum Kamaran]], a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. Nova Force was sent by [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] to [[Ylesia/Legends|Ylesia]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], to defend the planet and prevent [[Teroenza]] from declaring independence from [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]]. When [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces [[Battle of Ylesia|attacked the planet]], Nova Force fought bravely, but surrendered once it was clear that the Rebels would win the battle.

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' {{1st}}
